summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PerformOS One-on-One Builder V3. Backend achieved 92.3% success rate with all core functionality working including locked submissions and duplicate prevention. Frontend authentication, manager dashboard, and UI components working correctly. Minor data loading issue in team member weekly schedule grid.

minor_bugs.issue: Schedule status endpoint occasionally fails for team members causing 'Failed to load data' error
minor_bugs.impact: Prevents weekly schedule grid from displaying for team members

ui_bugs.issue: Weeks grid is hidden when schedule status API fails, showing 'Failed to load data' error

passed_tests: Manager login (alex@performos.io/demo)
Team member login (sarah@performos.io/demo)
Backend API connectivity and authentication
Weekly schedule endpoint (19 Monday dates, current: 2026-03-23)
Manager dashboard KPI cards (Submissions: 6/6, Health: 53%, Flags: 7)
Manager Schedule tab with 6 team member rows and status badges
Manager Team Health tab with 7 active flags and severity badges
Manager Performance Trends tab with 6 performance cards and sparklines
Tab switching between Schedule, Team Health, Performance Trends
Team member dashboard with trends display (5 trend cards)
Locked submission prevention (duplicate submission blocked)
New submission locking (submissions immediately locked with timestamp)
Manager members list (6 team members)
Manager flags list (7 active flags with action_required: 4, concern: 3)
Submissions list with locked status (27 total, 27 locked)
Toast notifications on login
Logout functionality for both roles
Premium UI styling with dark navy/white/teal color scheme
Sparkline trends display in manager dashboard
Flag quote snippets and severity badges
Role-based access control and navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix team member schedule status API reliability issue causing 'Failed to load data' error. This prevents the weekly schedule grid from displaying properly for team members. The backend endpoint works but may have intermittent issues.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (most features working, weekly schedule grid hidden due to API issue)
